name: admin-api
note: AGPL-3.0-only admin API code (Copyright (C) 2026 coolwhite LLC). Built from apps/api and docker/admin-api/Dockerfile. This is the active replacement for the retired PHP admin panel: Hono on Bun, Better Auth, RBAC, SQLite migrations, subscription output, status, audit history, and render action boundaries. Runtime health is checked through the local /up endpoint and by ct doctor.
